datasheet.text: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" horizontally of that token and not within 9" horizontally of any enemy models. That token is then removed.
datasheet.name: Teleport Homer

datasheet.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or to the Hit roll . In addition, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the enemy unit you selected at the start of your Command phase for the Oath of Moment ability, add 1 to the Hit roll.
datasheet.name: Deathwing

unit_composition.label: The Deathwing Sergeant is equipped with
Every Deathwing Terminator is equipped with

entries.label: Any number of Deathwing Terminators can each have their power fist replaced with 1 chainfist.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Deathwing Terminator can replace its storm bolter with one of the following:
items: 1 storm bolter and 1 cyclone missile launcher (this model’s storm bolter cannot be replaced)

entries.label: This unit can be equipped with 1 Watcher in the Dark.

entries.text: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" horizontally of that token and not within 9" horizontally of any enemy models. That token is then removed.
entries.name: Teleport Homer

entries.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or to the Hit roll . In addition, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the enemy unit you selected at the start of your Command phase for the Oath of Moment ability, add 1 to the Hit roll.
entries.name: Deathwing

entries.text: Once per battle, in any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model in this unit, this unit can summon a Watcher in the Dark. When it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.
entries.label: Watcher in the Dark

entries.text: Place a Watcher in the Dark token next to the unit, removing it when this ability has been used.
entries.label: Designer’s Note
The Deathwing Sergeant is equipped with
Every Deathwing Terminator is equipped with

entries.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a TERMINATOR SQUAD , it can be attached to this unit instead.
